examples.bio: Low-key living my best life. Looking for someone to join the adventure I won't post about.
Ask me about my scar. Better yet, ask me about my hidden talent. Actually, just buy me coffee.
What you see isn't what you get. It's better.
I'm an open book written in a language you'll have to learn. Worth the effort.
I don't overshare online. If you want to know me, you'll have to show up.
